claims.summary: Witness should skip a malformed newest chamber state and retain the newest valid state.
claims.disposition: verify resilient newest-valid selection and malformed-count tests

claims.summary: Weather fallback needs to distinguish missing keys from malformed nested shapes.
claims.disposition: verify missing_key and schema_drift diagnostics carry exact field paths

claims.summary: The selected weather source should remain inspectable.
claims.disposition: verify room_weather.weather, room_weather.label, and relational_inertia.current.weather source labels

claims.summary: Parsed relational metrics must not silently become reservoir-control inputs.
claims.disposition: verify they remain Witness interpretation context with diagnostic-only authority and no control dispatch path
